data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: While the linked use case describes the generation of a Zoom meeting link and its inclusion in a confirmation email, it does not explicitly confirm that the link is added to the calendar invite. The requirement states that the link must be added to both the calendar invite and email, but the evidence only supports the email aspect. Therefore, there is a gap in the evidence regarding the calendar invite linkage.
gaps: Link not confirmed to be added to calendar invite.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
